extraction_notes: Complete extraction from all 117 pages. All U-designators confirmed from schematic. M1 SoC (not M2). No MagSafe on this model — USB-C only charging. Has DFR (Touch Bar) and active fan cooling.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. TML R6A0-B09, 86A package. 23 SYM pages. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O. LPDDR4X on-package.

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. 2-in-1 RS register controller. ICC MAX 30A session 1 PH2. Phase drivers on page 26.
Slave Power Management Unit. Input: PP3V8_AON. Bucks, LDOs, switches, boost. SPMI interface.

Master Power Management Unit. Input: PP3V8_AON (VODMAN). Bucks, LDOs, 32K clock, charger reset. SPMI interface. Multiple part options: 998-22604 (3V bat), 998-22339 (12V DCIN), 998-22608 (13.8V DCIN).
Main charger IC converting USB-C input to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. PPOCIN_USBC_AON input. CHGR_EN_MVR, CHGR_AUX_OK, CHGR_INT_L control signals.
250mA MAX, IQ_ON < 12 uA. Input: PP3V8_AON. Output: PP3V3_AON. Enable: P3V3_AON_EN from PP1V8_AON_MPMU.
250mA MAX, IQ_ON < 12 uA, 0586A. Input: PP3V8_AON. Output: PP1V8_AON. Enable: P1V8_AON_EN from PP1V8_AON_MPMU.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V, EDC=6.6A, F=1.5MHz) from PPBUS_AON. Start up time < 15 ms. Enable: P5VS2_PWR_EN.
Produces PP3V3_S2 (3.3V, EDC=2.5A, TDC=2.8A, F=1.5MHz) from PPBUS_AON. Start up time < 5 ms. Enable: P3V3S2_PWR_EN.
Switches PP3V3_S2 → PP3V3_S2SW_SNS. Enable: SENSOR_PWR_EN. VDD 2.5-5.5V.
Switches PP3V8_AON → PP1V8_S2 / PP1V8_S2SW_VDD1. Enable: PVDD1_PWR_EN.
Port controller for ATC0 (left rear, debug port). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO (PP1V5_UPC0_LDO_CORE). SPI ROM for firmware.
Port controller for ATC1 (left front, non-debug port). Same as UF400 for second port.
Thunderbolt retimer for ATC0 port. AC coupling, high-speed signal conditioning. Internal 3.3V LDO.
Thunderbolt retimer for ATC1 port. Same as UF000 for second port.
Level shifts I2C_UPC0_ATCRTMR0 SDA/SCL between 1.2V and 1.8V domains.
Level shifts I2C_UPC1_ATCRTMR1 SDA/SCL.
INT I2C EUSBL0 LVS level shifter.
INT I2C EUSBL1 LVS level shifter.
Sequences reset for ATC0 retimer.
Ceres SE. Powered by PP1V8_S2, PP1V25_S2, PP3V8_AON. SPMI SE interface, I2C SE. NFC capable but many pins NC.
64M-bit SPI NOR flash. Powered by PP1V8_AWAKE. Level shifted from SoC 1.2V domain via U1974/U1983/U1992.
Level shifts SPI_SOCROM signals from PP1V25_AWAKE_IO to PP1V8_AWAKE domain.
First NAND flash package. SSE-RCP STUD. Powered by PPVDS_MAME5W_NAND, PP1V25_AWAKE5W_VCCQ, PP2V5_AWAKE_NAND.
Second NAND flash package. Same power as S5E0.
Rasputin WiFi/BT module with integrated front-ends. 3 UL060 SYM instances. Powered by PP1V25_S2, PP3V3_S2. Uses SUNWAY single source antenna connectors.
Sequences display panel power rails. Inputs: LCD_PWR_EN, PMU_SYS_ALIVE. Controls PANEL_EN_OUT, EDP_PANEL_1V8_EN, EDP_PANEL_PWR_EN, BLC_5V_EN.
Generates PP5V_SW_LCD and PP3V3_SW_LCD from PP5V_S2 and PP3V3_S2.
Boost converter for LCD backlight LED strings and keyboard backlight. Input: PPBUS_AON. Controls LCD and KBD backlight brightness.
Bosch IMU. Powered by PP1V8_S2 (filtered via FLE400). SPI interface with level translation.
I2C temperature sensor. Address WR:0x90 RD:0x91. Powered by PP3V3_S2SW_SNS.
ESD protection on battery I2C lines.
Level translates charger interrupt from PP1V8_S2 to PP1V25_S2 domain.
Delay circuit for P3V8AON_PWR_EN. Input: CHGR_EN_MVR_DLY via D5340/R5342. Output: P3V8AON_PWR_EN.
Generates CHGR_RST_IN → UPC_PMU_RESET_DV2. Followed by ON-OFF button press.
Audio codec IC. I2C address varies by supply voltage. Powered by PP3V3_AON, PP1V25_AWAKE_IO, PP1V8_AWAKE. Stereo DAC/ADC.

ics.function: Speaker amplifier ICs (Left: A, B, C)
ics.description: TAS5770 class-D amplifiers. 3 left amps (A/B/C). Powered by PPBUS_AON (via PPBUS_SPKRAMP_LEFT_ISNS), PP1V25_AWAKE_IO, PP1V8_AWAKE.

ics.function: Speaker amplifier ICs (Right: D, E, F)
ics.description: TAS5770 class-D amplifiers. 3 right amps (D/E/F). Powered by PPBUS_AON (via PPBUS_SPKRAMP_RIGHT_ISNS).
I2C GPIO expander for keyboard matrix. Powered by PP3V3_S2.
Second keyboard I/O expander.
Keyboard signal isolation IC.

ics.function: IPD LDO — 1.85V for trackpad and keyboard IOX
ics.description: LDO producing PP1V85_S2_IPD from PP3V8_AON. 3.2uF load cap, EDP 0.42A.
Produces PP3V3_S2_TPAD from PP3V8_AON.
Boost converter for Touch Bar/TouchID. Produces PP16V_TOUCHID from PPBUS_AON.
LDO for TouchID. Produces PP3V0_TOUCHID.
LDO for TouchID. Produces PP1V85_TOUCHID.
DFR 1.8V LDO. Produces PP1V8_AWAKE_DFR.
Produces PP3V3_AWAKE_DFR.
N-channel MOSFET controlling fan speed via SMC_FAN_LS_PWM signal.
6-pin fan connector. PP5V_S2_TO_FAN power, FAN_RT_PWM, FAN_RT_TACH signals.
Level shifts SMC_FAN_PWM from PP1V25_S2 domain to SMC_FAN_LS_PWM.
